action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current metadata of the database environment including schema version, migration history, and system integrity status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_replication_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the synchronization status and performance metrics (e.g., IOPS usage, lag) between the Aurora target and the Oracle source.

db_id.description: The database identifier to check metrics for.

action_set_definitions.name: modify_db_instance_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Scales database resources such as IOPS or instance class to resolve performance bottlenecks.

db_id.description: The identifier of the database instance to modify.

allocated_storage_iops.description: The new IOPS value to set.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_database_components
action_set_definitions.description: Enables or disables database components such as triggers, constraints, or indexes to facilitate high-speed data loading or maintain integrity.

component_type.description: The type of component to manage.

action_set_definitions.name: initiate_reverse_sync
action_set_definitions.description: Starts the data synchronization process from the Aurora target back to the Oracle source for a specific time window.

window_minutes.description: The duration in minutes of transactions to sync back.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_database_integrity
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a deep consistency check on the specified database.

db_id.description: Identifier for the database to validate.

action_set_definitions.name: flush_secondary_data_streams
action_set_definitions.description: Ensures all cached or buffered data in secondary streams are written and closed.

action_set_definitions.name: update_dns_routing
action_set_definitions.description: Points the application traffic to the legacy database endpoint.

target_endpoint.description: The DNS or connection string for the legacy database.

state_description.current_schema_version: The unique identifier of the currently active database migration version.
state_description.migration_history: A list of migration IDs that have been successfully applied to the database, in chronological order.
state_description.db_lock_active: Indicates if a migration lock is currently held. True prevents schema modifications.
state_description.integrity_status: Current health of the database schema (e.g., 'HEALTHY', 'INCONSISTENT', 'MIGRATING').
state_description.available_backups: List of available snapshot IDs that can be used for full restoration.
state_description.last_migration_log: The stdout/stderr output from the last migration or rollback attempt.

task_initial_state.last_migration_log: Reverse replication task 'TITAN_REV_CDC' is active but struggling. Current reverse_repl_lag_ms: 12,500ms and increasing. Source DB CPU utilization at 98%. System logs indicate 'TRG_AUDIT_LEDGER' is firing for every CDC insert, causing significant IOPS contention on the legacy storage array. Queue depth: 4,500 events.
